title: Chainsaw Man Weapons Reskin
description: Allows you harness the power of the Chainsaw Devil. Supports Shields, Swords, Axes, and every other material. Netherite to Wood
body:
Allows you harness the power of the Chainsaw Devil

THIS ONLY CHANGES THE LOOK OF THE SWORDS, AXES, AND SHIELDS IF THEY ARE RENAMED SO THERE IS NO DOWNSIDE!!!!

If the model doesn't appear for you, you likely will need to download one of the "CIT" mods such as CIT Resewn

All of these names give the same model, but you can choose which suits you best!
"Chainsaw", "Chainsaws", "CSM", "Chainsaw Man" "Kickback", "Kick Back", "Ash", and "Groovy"

If you want it on your head like in the screenshots

/item replace entity @s armor.head with netherite_sword[minecraft:custom_name=Chainsaw]

Type "Subsetg4ming" in your search bar to find everything by me!
